Bookmark rules: Do not attempt to set non‑existent Range.Start/End properties; instead walk the node tree to collect text between bookmarks.
Preserve paragraph breaks while iterating nodes between bookmarks for readable output.
Range rules: When extracting footnote text, use Footnote.GetText() rather than accessing a non‑existent Range property.
Document merge/insert rules: Clone the original document before calling Compare if you need to keep the original unchanged.
Loading rules: Use the Document(string) constructor for loading files – the approved loading rule.
Saving/Export rules: Save the modified document after the Compare call to obtain the comparison output.
Add a reference to System.Diagnostics and create a ProcessStartInfo that points to the saved PDF file.
Keep the mail‑merge, LINQ rendering, and PDF saving logic unchanged.
Save the final document as .docm to retain macros.
Layout rules: Include the Aspose.Words.Notes namespace to access the Footnote class.
